description: OCR prompt templates for Bulgarian election protocol pages (27.10.2024 parliamentary elections). Each page type describes the expected structure to guide the OCR model.

1.title: Заглавна страница на протокола (ЧАСТ I)
1.prompt:
This page contains the protocol header and PART I data.

Expected structure (top to bottom):
- Control number (фабричен номер): 7-digit number at the very top and bottom of the page
- 'ЛИСТ 1 Екземпляр за ЦИК' label
- Form type: 'Приложение № 75-НС-х' (Form 24), '76-НС-хм' (Form 26), '77-НС-чх' (Form 28), or '78-НС-чхм' (Form 30)
- Form number (№ формуляр): 8-digit number near the top (e.g. '01022018')
- Section code in spaced-digit format: 'X X X X X X X X X' (9 digits separated by spaces, e.g. '0 1 0 1 0 0 0 0 1')
- Municipality and locality names
- RIK code: 'изборен район NN - Name' where NN is the 1-2 digit district code
- Commission members list
- ЧАСТ I section:
  - А. Брой на получените бюлетини (ballots received): number in '(с цифри)' format

Key fields to extract:
  | Field | Description | Format |
  | Control number | Фабричен номер | 7-digit number, top and bottom of page |
  | Form type | Приложение № | 75→24, 76→26, 77→28, 78→30 |
  | Form number | № формуляр | 8-digit number |
  | Section code | Код на секция | 9 spaced digits → 9-digit code |
  | RIK code | Изборен район | 1-2 digit number |
  | Ballots received | А. Брой получени бюлетини | Integer in '(с цифри)' |

2.title: Данни от избирателния списък и ЧАСТ II (хартиени бюлетини)
2.prompt:
This page contains voter list data and paper ballot counting results.

Expected structure:
- Control number at top and bottom
- ДАННИ ОТ ИЗБИРАТЕЛНИЯ СПИСЪК section (Form table):
  | Row | Field | Description |
  | 1. | Брой избиратели в списъка | Voter list count (field 8) |
  | 2. | Вписани в допълнителната страница | Additional voters (field 11) |
  | 3. | Брой гласували (подписи) | Voted count (field 12) |
  Each row has two columns: description text and '(с цифри)' value

- ДАННИ ИЗВЪН ИЗБИРАТЕЛНИЯ СПИСЪК section (Form table):
  | Row | Field | Description |
  | 4.а) | Неизползвани хартиени бюлетини | Unused ballots (field 13) |
  | 4.б) | Недействителни хартиени бюлетини | Invalid ballots outside box (field 14) |

- ЧАСТ II section (Form table):
  | Row | Field | Description |
  | 5. | Намерени в кутията хартиени бюлетини | Paper ballots in box (field 15) |
  | 6. | Недействителни гласове | Invalid votes (field 16) |
  | 7. | Действителни 'Не подкрепям никого' | No-support votes (field 17) |

All numeric values appear in '(с цифри)' format in the last column of each row.

3.title: Разпределение на гласовете по партии — хартиени бюлетини (страница 1 от 2)
3.prompt:
This page contains the first part of the paper vote distribution table (точка 8).

Expected structure:
- Control number at top and bottom
- Section header: '8. РАЗПРЕДЕЛЕНИЕ НА ГЛАСОВЕТЕ ПО КАНДИДАТСКИ ЛИСТИ ОТ ХАРТИЕНИТЕ БЮЛЕТИНИ'
- Vote table with columns:
  | № | Наименование на партия/коалиция | Действителни гласове |

Each row contains:
  - Party number (e.g. '2.', '4.', '18.')
  - Party/coalition name
  - Vote count in format: 'word_value\n(с думи) numeric_value\n(с цифри)'

Typically contains parties 2-18 (parties 1 and 3 are not registered).
The numeric value after '(с цифри)' is the authoritative count.

Note: Some rows may have 3 columns (№, name, combined votes) or 4 columns (№, name, words, digits) depending on OCR layout.

4.title: Разпределение на гласовете по партии — хартиени бюлетини (страница 2 от 2) + Общо
4.prompt:
This page continues the paper vote distribution table and includes the total.

Expected structure:
- Control number at top and bottom
- Continuation of vote table (typically parties 19-28)
  - Row format may differ: first column contains 'N. PARTY NAME' (number + name combined)
  - Vote count in '(с думи)' and '(с цифри)' columns

- After the table:
  - '9. Общ брой на действителните гласове, подадени за кандидатските листи' (total valid paper votes, field 18)
  - Total value in '(с цифри)' format — may be in a separate Text div or in a Table row

Key field to extract:
  | Field | Description |
  | Total valid paper votes (field 18) | '9. Общ брой' — sum of all party votes |

5.title: Преференции от хартиени бюлетини (страница 1 от 3)
5.prompt:
This page contains paper preference votes for candidates (точка 10).

Expected structure:
- Control number at top and bottom (may use 'Page-Header' label instead of 'Text')
- Section header: '10. РАЗПРЕДЕЛЕНИЕ НА ПРЕДПОЧИТАНИЯТА (ПРЕФЕРЕНЦИЙТЕ)'
- Preference table with party blocks. Each party block has 4 rows:

  Row 1 (14 cells): [party_num, party_name, vote_101, vote_102, ..., vote_112]
    - Party number in first cell (e.g. '2.', '4.')
    - Votes for candidates 101-112 in cells 3-14

  Row 2 (11 cells): [113, 114, 115, ..., 122, 'Без преференции']
    - Header row for second batch of candidates
    - Last cell is 'Без преференции' (colspan=2)

  Row 3 (11-12 cells): [vote_113, vote_114, ..., vote_122, bez_pref_value]
    - Votes for candidates 113-122
    - Cell at index 10 is the 'Без преференции' count (may have extra trailing cell due to colspan)

  Row 4 (12 cells): [101, 102, ..., 112]
    - Header row for next party block

Typically contains parties 2-10 on this page.
This page may be truncated (no Page-Footer) — use flush parsing.

6.title: Преференции от хартиени бюлетини (страница 2 от 3)
6.prompt:
This page continues the paper preference table (точка 10).

Same structure as page 5 — party blocks with 4 rows each.
Typically contains parties 11-17.

Note: This page often uses 'Page-Header' label (not 'Text') for the control number div at the top.
This page may be truncated — use flush parsing to recover partial table data.

7.title: Преференции от хартиени бюлетини (страница 3 от 3) + Машинно гласуване начало
7.prompt:
This page has two sections:

1. CONTINUATION OF PAPER PREFERENCES (точка 10):
  - Party blocks for remaining parties (typically 21-28)
  - Uses Pattern B format: first row has 13 cells ['N. PARTY NAME', 101, 102, ..., 112]
  - Second row has 12 cells with vote counts for 101-112
  - Third row: header [113, ..., 122, 'Без преференции']
  - Fourth row: votes for 113-122 + bez_pref value at index 10
  - КОНТРОЛА text after the table

2. MACHINE VOTING SECTION (only for Form 26/30):
  - Section header: 'ПРЕБРОЯВАНЕ НА ГЛАСОВЕТЕ ОТ БЮЛЕТИНИТЕ ОТ МАШИННО ГЛАСУВАНЕ'
  - Table (may be labeled 'Table' or 'Form') with:
    | Row | Field | Description |
    | 11. | Бюлетини от машинно гласуване в кутията | Machine ballots in box (field 19) |
    | 12. | Действителни 'Не подкрепям никого' от машинно | Machine no-support votes (field 20) |
  - Values in '(с цифри)' format in the last column

This page may be truncated before the machine section — use flush parsing.

8.title: Разпределение на гласовете по партии — машинно гласуване (страница 1 от 2)
8.prompt:
This page contains the first part of the machine vote distribution table (точка 13). Only present for Form 26/30.

Expected structure:
- Control number at top and bottom
- Section header: '13. РАЗПРЕДЕЛЕНИЕ НА ГЛАСОВЕТЕ ПО КАНДИДАТСКИ ЛИСТИ ОТ БЮЛЕТИНТЕ ОТ МАШИННО ГЛАСУВАНЕ'
- Vote table with columns:
  | № | Наименование на партия/коалиция | (с думи) | (с цифри) |

Same structure as page 3 but for machine votes.
Typically contains parties 2-17.
The '(с цифри)' value is the authoritative count.

9.title: Разпределение на гласовете по партии — машинно гласуване (страница 2 от 2) + Общо
9.prompt:
This page continues the machine vote distribution and includes the total. Only present for Form 26/30.

Expected structure:
- Continuation of machine vote table (typically parties 18-28)
  - Row format: 'N. PARTY NAME' in first column (number + name combined)
  - May be in a 'Form' div (not 'Table')

- After the table:
  - '14. Общ брой на действителните гласове' (total valid machine votes, field 21)
  - Total value in '(с цифри)' format

Key field to extract:
  | Field | Description |
  | Total valid machine votes (field 21) | '14. Общ брой' — sum of all machine party votes |

10.title: Преференции от машинно гласуване (страница 1 от 5)
10.prompt:
This page contains machine preference votes for candidates (точка 15). Only present for Form 26/30.

Expected structure:
- Control number at top and bottom (may use 'Text' label, bottom control number may also be 'Text' with y > 900)
- This is a single-line HTML page with all divs on one line
- Typically contains only header divs and a page number — the actual preference table starts on page 11

Same table structure as paper preferences (pages 5-7).

11.title: Преференции от машинно гласуване (страница 2 от 5)
11.prompt:
This page contains machine preference votes (точка 15 continued). Only present for Form 26/30.

Expected structure:
- Control number at top (may use 'Page-Header' label)
- Section header: '15. РАЗПРЕДЕЛЕНИЕ НА ПРЕДПОЧИТАНИЯТА (ПРЕФЕРЕНЦИЙТЕ) ЗА КАНДИДАТИТЕ'
- Preference table with same party block structure as pages 5-7:
  Row 1 (14 cells): [party_num, party_name, vote_101, ..., vote_112]
  Row 2 (11 cells): [113, ..., 122, 'Без преференции']
  Row 3 (11-12 cells): [vote_113, ..., vote_122, bez_pref_value]
  Row 4 (12 cells): [101, ..., 112] (header for next block)

Typically contains parties 2-9.
This page may be truncated — use flush parsing.

12.title: Преференции от машинно гласуване (страница 3 от 5)
12.prompt:
Continuation of machine preference table (точка 15). Only present for Form 26/30.
Same structure as page 11. Typically contains parties 10-16.
May be truncated — use flush parsing.

13.title: Преференции от машинно гласуване (страница 4 от 5)
13.prompt:
Continuation of machine preference table (точка 15). Only present for Form 26/30.
Same structure as page 11. Typically contains parties 17-22.
May be truncated — use flush parsing.

14.title: Преференции от машинно гласуване (страница 5 от 5)
14.prompt:
Final page of machine preference table (точка 15). Only present for Form 26/30.
Same structure as page 11 but uses Pattern B (merged party+name in first cell).
Typically contains parties 23-28.
Ends with КОНТРОЛА text.
Should have Page-Footer with control number.

common_patterns.cifri_value: Numeric values appear in '(с цифри)' format. The authoritative number is always the one labeled '(с цифри)', not '(с думи)' (words). Example: 'шестстотин (с думи) 600 (с цифри)' → extract 600.
common_patterns.control_number: A 7-digit factory number (фабричен номер) appears at the top and bottom of every page. Top: first numeric-only div (Text or Page-Header label, smallest y-coordinate). Bottom: numeric div with y > 900 (Page-Footer or Text label, 5+ digits to distinguish from page number).
common_patterns.page_labels: HTML divs have data-label attribute: Text, Section-Header, Form, Table, Image, Page-Footer, Page-Header. Form and Table divs contain <table> elements with structured data.
common_patterns.truncated_pages: Pages 5-7 and 10-14 may be truncated mid-table in the HTML. Use flush parsing to recover partial data. Truncated pages will be missing the Page-Footer div.
common_patterns.colspan: The 'Без преференции' cell uses colspan=2 in the HTML. This may result in the data row having 12 cells instead of 11. The bez value is always at index 10 (after 10 candidate votes for 113-122).
